overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a feathered cloak exploring a snowy landscape under a burning red sky. The character walks through open fields, crosses ancient stone ruins, and passes through a narrow rock corridor while embers float through the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowfield with giant twisted tree and distant stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward ancient stone ruins visible in the distance

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree trunk with twisted branches covered in snow
ruined stone structure with elevated platform and carved details
leafless trees with bare branches dotting the snowy landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast snow-covered field under a burning red sky. A giant twisted tree stands prominently on the left while ancient stone ruins are visible in the distance ahead. The landscape is dotted with dead trees and glowing red embers float through the air.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins with elevated bridge

events.description: character turns left toward the stone ruins, leaving the giant tree behind
ascending onto the stone platform and crossing the ancient bridge structure

agents.ego_description: turns left and approaches the stone ruins, climbing onto the elevated platform and crossing the bridge

entered.detail: carved stone bridge connecting platforms with ornate edge patterns
tall rock walls flanking the stone structure

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and approaches the ancient stone ruins, ascending onto an elevated platform. The giant tree falls behind as the character crosses a carved stone bridge flanked by cliff walls, moving toward a narrow passage ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rock passage between high cliff walls

events.description: entering the narrow passage between rock walls, sky becomes mostly obscured

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridor between high rock walls

entered.detail: tight corridor between stone walls with snow-covered ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed passage between high rock walls. The burning sky is mostly blocked by the cliffs above, creating a darker, sheltered environment. The stone platform and bridge are left behind as the character proceeds through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowfield with scattered dead trees under burning sky

events.description: exiting the narrow passage back into open snowfield with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing through the open snowfield, walking past scattered dead trees under the vivid red sky

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow passage back into a wide-open snowfield. The burning red sky is fully visible again, dominating the horizon above scattered dead trees. The character continues walking through the snow toward distant mountains, with the rock corridor now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy wasteland that transitions from wide-open plains into a claustrophobic rock corridor before returning to a vast horizon. It begins with the character walking across a snow-covered field under a burning red sky, passing a giant twisted tree and floating embers while heading toward distant stone ruins. As the character turns left, the scene shifts from the open field to an elevated stone platform and a carved bridge flanked by steep cliff walls. The environment then contracts as the camera enters a narrow, enclosed passage where the high rock walls block out the red sky, creating a darker and more sheltered atmosphere. Finally, the character emerges from the corridor back into a wide-open snowfield, where the burning sky once again dominates the horizon above scattered dead trees and distant mountains.
